name: salonbw-codex
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for SalonBW project operations and MCP setup.

interface.shortDescription: Project-local repo guidance and MCP setup entrypoint
interface.longDescription: Use the SalonBW local plugin for repo-specific Codex routing, project operations context, and per-project MCP setup references.
defaultPrompt: Use SalonBW Codex to set up project-local MCP tooling
Use SalonBW Codex to route CI, deploy, and smoke-test work
Use SalonBW Codex to map project tasks to GitHub, Playwright, and Obsidian
